name: agent-evolve
description: Agent evolution workflows for self-critique, session archaeology, and turning useful patterns into reusable skills.

interface.shortDescription: Self-critique, session archaeology, and skill evolution
interface.longDescription: Agent improvement workflows for iterative self-critique, cross-session pattern discovery, and extracting durable knowledge from conversations into reusable Skills, Agents, Hooks, or Plugins.
defaultPrompt: Run a self-critique loop on this draft.
Surprise me with patterns from previous sessions.
Extract reusable knowledge from this conversation.
